data.about: Engineering leader with 8+ years building scalable systems across AI, fintech, healthcare, and SaaS. Currently leading engineering at Astel Ventures, building AIRA — an AI-powered investor relations platform. Core expertise: AI/LLM integrations (RAG pipelines, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock), full-stack development (Django, Vue.js, React), and engineering team leadership. Published researcher with 389+ citations in AI & Computer Vision.
data.company_description:
Astel makes every founder and advisor 5x faster at pattern recognition, research and fundrasing.

We empower companies and advisory firms to revolutionise their Investor Relations and Business Development processes through cutting-edge AI technology. 

We invest in our companies showing long term commitment and partnership. As a result we are building long term equity positions in tech firms.  

Our solutions harness the power of Machine Learning, Big Data, and Artificial Intelligence to deliver superhuman efficiency and results. 

📍London 📍Dubai
data.company_industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

experiences.description:
- Senior engineering for AIRA an AI-powered investor relations and deal analysis platform
- Architect AI/LLM integrations including pitch deck analysis using multiple LLM
- Build and maintain full-stack features with Django, Vue.js, Celery, and Elasticsearch
- Implement LinkedIn enrichment pipelines processing thousands of investor contacts
experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer

experiences.description:
- Led engineering team building regulatory compliance SaaS platform
- Architected backend services with Django/FastAPI
- Managed cross-functional team delivering features on schedule
experiences.skills: Technical Staff Management · Python (Programming Language) · Django
experiences.title: Engineering Technical Lead

experiences.description:
- Led an engineering team while architecting and developing data pipelines for efficient ETL processes.
- Implemented high-performance analytics systems for large-scale data processing while mentoring junior developers.
- Designed and built caching solutions using Redis that improved application response times by 60%.
- Established development standards and best practices while creating scaleable backends.
- Managed team workflows, sprint planning, and deployments using Docker and Kubernetes orchestration.
experiences.skills: python · Amazon Web Services (AWS) · FastAPI · JavaScript · Django
experiences.title: Tehnical Lead

experiences.description:
- Built the entire backend infrastructure from scratch using Python and Django
- Developed a cross-platform desktop application using Electron.js for golf course management and scoring
- Architected REST APIs serving golf analytics, player tracking, and tournament management features
- Managed the full development lifecycle from requirements gathering to deployment and maintenance
experiences.skills: Software Infrastructure · Software Design · Software Development · Software Systems Engineering
experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer

data.headline: Senior Software Engineer at Astel Ventures
